topic: DeFi users / active addresses over time (2020 to 2026)
summary: DeFi participation, measured by cumulative unique wallet addresses, grew from roughly 1 million (Dec 2020) to over 330 million by mid-2026 according to Richard Chen's widely cited Dune Analytics dashboard. CRITICAL CAVEAT: that dashboard counts CUMULATIVE unique addresses ever to interact with tracked DeFi apps across all chains, and explicitly notes 'Users = unique addresses; since a user can have multiple addresses, these graphs are overestimates.' The number of real PEOPLE is far smaller. a16z's State of Crypto reports estimate only 30-70 million monthly ACTIVE crypto users worldwide (out of ~716 million crypto owners), and that DeFi accounts for roughly a third of daily on-chain activity. Total crypto monthly active ADDRESSES (all activity, not just DeFi) peaked at an all-time high of ~220 million in September 2024 per a16z, then settled to ~181 million by 2025 (down 18% YoY) as the Solana-driven memecoin surge cooled. Headline takeaways: (1) cumulative DeFi addresses grew ~330x from 2020 to 2026; (2) addresses are NOT people and overstate the user base substantially; (3) growth accelerated sharply in 2024-2025, driven heavily by low-fee chains (Solana, Base, BNB, Tron). Different methodologies produce very different numbers, so cross-source comparison requires care.

series.label: Cumulative unique DeFi addresses ('users') - all chains, milestone/EOY

points.note: ~19,673 cumulative addresses end of 2019 (Dune rchen8 dashboard). Pre-DeFi-Summer baseline.
1,001,461 unique DeFi addresses reached Dec 4-5, 2020 (Dune Analytics / Richard Chen). EOY ~0.85M on later dashboard revision; ~1M is the contemporaneous reported milestone.

End-of-2021 cumulative ~20.9M on current Dune dashboard. Milestones during 2021: 2M (Apr 25), 3M (Jul 13), 4M (Nov 21, +233% YoY). Higher EOY figure reflects multi-chain expansion vs Ethereum-only early counts.
~35.8M cumulative addresses end of 2022 (Dune rchen8). Growth slowed during bear market / FTX collapse.
~150.8M cumulative addresses end of 2024 (Dune rchen8). Sharp acceleration driven by low-fee chains (Solana, Base, BNB).
~332.6M cumulative addresses (latest data point dated Jun 6, 2026 on Dune rchen8). This is the all-time-high cumulative count and current value. OVERESTIMATE of real users.
Current value as of latest dashboard snapshot (Jun 6, 2026). Cumulative metric - only goes up over time.

series.label: Total crypto monthly active addresses (all on-chain activity, not DeFi-only)

points.note: Approximate end-of-2023 level; a16z states Sept 2024 figure 'more than tripled since end of 2023', implying roughly ~65-70M at end 2023. Estimated/derived.

All-time-high: 220M addresses interacted with a blockchain at least once in Sept 2024 (a16z State of Crypto 2024). Breakdown: Solana ~100M, NEAR 31M, Base 22M, Tron 14M, Bitcoin 11M, BNB 10M, Ethereum 6M.
181M monthly active addresses (a16z State of Crypto 2025), down 18% YoY from the 2024 peak as the Solana memecoin surge cooled. Current/latest value for this metric.

series.label: Estimated monthly ACTIVE crypto users worldwide (real people, all crypto)

points.note: a16z estimates 30-60M active crypto users worldwide (midpoint ~45M), only 5-10% of ~617M total crypto owners (Crypto.com, Jun 2024). DeFi = 34% of daily active addresses.
a16z estimates 40-70M active crypto users (midpoint ~55M), up ~10M YoY, out of 716M total crypto owners (+16% YoY). Not DeFi-only; DeFi is a large subset.

series.label: Total crypto owners worldwide (context, not active users)

points.note: ~617M global crypto owners (Crypto.com data cited by a16z, June 2024). Only 5-10% are monthly active.
716M crypto owners, up 16% YoY (a16z State of Crypto 2025). Of these only ~40-70M are monthly active.

key_facts.claim: DeFi crossed 1 million cumulative unique addresses on Dec 4-5, 2020
DeFi crossed 2 million cumulative unique addresses on Apr 25, 2021 (doubled in ~4.5 months)
DeFi crossed 3 million cumulative unique addresses (24 tracked apps) on Jul 13, 2021
DeFi unique addresses exceeded 4 million on Nov 21, 2021, up 233% in 2021
Cumulative unique DeFi addresses reached ~332.6 million (all-time high, current value) - explicit OVERESTIMATE of real users
Total crypto monthly active addresses hit all-time high of 220 million in Sept 2024 (more than tripled vs end-2023)
Total crypto monthly active addresses fell to 181 million in 2025, down 18% YoY
Estimated 30-60 million monthly active crypto users worldwide (2024), only 5-10% of 617M crypto owners
Estimated 40-70 million monthly active crypto users worldwide (2025), out of 716M crypto owners
DeFi represented 34% of daily crypto usage by share of daily active addresses (2024) - the single largest category
Monthly active addresses interacting with DeFi protocols fluctuated between ~300M and ~390M for most of 2025 (broader crawl methodology, differs from a16z)
DeFi captured roughly 20-25% of all spot trading volume (DEX share) by 2025, up from ~4% in 2024
key_facts.source_name: a16z State of Crypto 2025 / DL News State of DeFi 2025

key_facts.claim: METHODOLOGY CAVEAT: addresses are NOT people. One person can control many wallets, and one wallet (smart contract / exchange) can represent many people. Dune cumulative counts only grow over time and overestimate users.

top_entities.name: Solana (2025)
top_entities.metric: monthly active addresses (2025, most active network)
